case_title: SILVIA E EMERY VS. ELETHIA G BURCH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,995.00 FILED BY EMERY, SILVIA E AS TO DEFENDANT BURCH, ELETHIA G GOODWIN, ELECTRA GENTRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506).
